## Course Alignment

- [ ] Updated syllabus or relevant course page
- [ ] Updated source registry when source status changed
- [ ] Updated example README or case card when runnable behavior changed
- [ ] Did not present unverified X/Feishu signals as reproduced facts
- [ ] Did not include secrets, Feishu raw content, X cookies/API tokens, or private logs
